semantic_description: Copies the first k nonzero characters from src into dst and then writes a terminating zero at dst[k]. The contract requires 0 <= k <= n, src owns a length n+1 character array containing l followed by 0, dst owns k+1 characters, and every character in l is nonzero. The only control structure is a for loop from i = 0 to i < k. The function preserves the full src array and updates dst in place so that dst becomes sublist(0,k,l) followed by 0. The empty prefix case k = 0 skips the loop and writes only the terminator.
